action_terms: S_PR230_top[s] with the existing additive top scalar source coordinate
action_ansatz.lattice: same hypercubic sites and scalar source coordinate s as the top FH/LSZ harness
action_ansatz.name: PR230 same-source EW/Higgs action-extension ansatz
action_ansatz.why_this_is_the_clean_contract: It makes the missing source-to-Higgs object a gauge-invariant action derivative instead of a source-only normalization choice.

actual_current_surface_status: conditional support / same-source EW/Higgs action-extension ansatz specified; actual current-surface adoption absent

adoption_requirements.required: repo accepts this action-extension as an actual PR230 same-surface action, not only an ansatz
accepted canonical O_H identity/normalization certificate on the actual current surface
production C_ss/C_sH/C_HH pole rows with Gram/FV/IR/model-class checks
same-source W/Z response rows with identity, covariance, strict g2, and delta_perp authority
retained/proposed_retained route certificate passes after the physical row packet exists

conditional_surface_status: support if the ansatz is separately adopted as a same-surface PR230 EW/Higgs action and followed by canonical O_H plus C_sH/C_HH or W/Z rows
exact_next_action: Either promote this ansatz through a same-surface adoption theorem and then produce canonical O_H/C_sH/C_HH pole rows, or implement genuine same-source W/Z response rows with identity/covariance/g2 authority.

fms_phi_dagger_phi_expansion_check.expression: O_H = Phi^dagger Phi - v^2/2 = v*h + (h^2 + pi^2)/2

hypothetical_axiom_status: hypothetical action-extension ansatz; not an accepted current-surface axiom

parent_statuses.fms_composite_oh_conditional_theorem: conditional-support / FMS composite O_H theorem; current PR230 surface lacks same-surface EW/Higgs action and source-overlap pole rows
parent_statuses.full_positive_closure_assembly_gate: open / full positive PR230 closure assembly gate not passed
parent_statuses.higgs_mass_source_action_bridge: conditional-support / Higgs mass-source action bridge; same-surface EW/Higgs action and source-Higgs rows absent
parent_statuses.post_fms_source_overlap_necessity_gate: exact negative boundary / post-FMS source-overlap not derivable from current PR230 source-only or C_sx/C_xx rows
parent_statuses.retained_closure_route: open / retained closure not yet reached
parent_statuses.source_higgs_overlap_kappa_contract: exact-support / source-Higgs overlap-kappa row contract; current row packet absent
parent_statuses.wz_same_source_ew_action_certificate_bui: open / same-source EW action certificate absent
parent_statuses.wz_same_source_ew_action_gate: exact negative boundary / same-source EW action not defined on PR230 surface

proposal_allowed_reason: The ansatz gives a concrete action contract but does not adopt the action on the current PR230 surface, does not write accepted future certificate paths, and supplies no C_sH/C_HH or W/Z production rows.
strict_non_claims: does not claim retained or proposed_retained top-Yukawa closure
does not write the accepted same-source EW action certificate path
does not write the accepted canonical O_H certificate path
does not set kappa_s, c2, or Z_match to one
does not use H_unit, yt_ward_identity, observed targets, alpha_LM, plaquette, or u0
